title: File:Maasdam_and_Westerdam_anchored_in_Half_Moon_Cay.JPG
description:
MS Maasdam (left) and MS Westerdam (right) are anchored side by side off Half Moon Cay, Little San Salvador Island, Bahamas.
  • They are both cruise ships belonging to Holland America Line. One island tender is seen next to Westerdam.
  • The Maasdam (IMO 8919257) and Westerdam (IMO 9226891) fly the Dutch flag.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Two ships in frame: Maasdam (S-class, left) + a Vista-class HAL ship (right). Right ship's class matches Westerdam but name not visible; Vista-class sister ambiguity
